title: pak_quality_estimation: support-aware daily PM2.5 estimation for Pakistan
description: Code and data release accompanying the manuscript "Recent monitor history improves daily PM2.5 estimation but weakens national transfer under sparse monitoring: a support-aware model for Pakistan" (Ahmad, Naveed, Omar; submitted to Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics). Contents: the LightGBM support-aware estimation pipeline (data extraction, feature engineering, training, inference); the held-out 2025 station-day validation table (validation/pm25_2025_station_day_validation.csv), which reproduces the paper's headline numbers (with-history MAE 14.3 / F1@150 0.838; no-history MAE 23.2); and the daily gridded 0.1-degree PM2.5 prediction fields for 2024-2025 (data/gridded_predictions_2024_2025/). Software is released under the MIT licence; the derived data products (gridded predictions, validation table) are released under CC-BY-4.0. Raw individual low-cost-sensor records are not included for privacy reasons and are available from PAQI on request.
